title: Ezztrade
description: A mod that makes it easier to find enchantments from the librarian
body:
### This mod makes it easier to find the needed enchantments from a librarian
> EzzTrade is a client-side mod that makes it easier to find enchantments from a librarian with a user-friendly interface and reroll mechanics
## Usage
1. **Place the villager in the room**![the best room option](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9552490198331dafc32c5d6781699203454bb24.png)
2. **Open the menu using the /ezztrade menu command or by selecting a hotkey in the settings** ![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edfb5009a2191ad16ec9262a5065097b40078885_0.webp)
3. **Select the desired enchantment in the search and add it** ![book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45f0b1887f2e5343e47247a204bd10a9ffbb52c4_0.webp)
4. **Set the maximum price for this enchantment** ![max](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a711cdd30b57ff03cdc26dcac4dd2110d8834da_0.webp)
5. **Look at the Lectern and select it with the command /ezztrade select or a hotkey**![Select](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8845334f65b0d7741c09599dae0ea36daa3464.png)
6. **Put enough lecterns in your off-hand and an axe in your main-hand then stand close to the lecterns and start with the command /ezztrade start/stop either by using a hotkey**![reroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1255e87ee34e523c17a0827600e0c88ca3499d6.png)
## Demo
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/NNXAZDw8FSQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The mod still needs to be finalized, so expect more improvements in future updates.
